allow:
Bash(git commit --amend -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
V-World API 연결 안정성 개선

- CORS 프록시 fallback 시스템 개선
  - 직접연결 → corsproxy.io → allorigins.win 순서로 시도
  - allorigins URL 인코딩 처리 수정
  - 각 프록시별 에러 로깅 추가
- 타임아웃 25초로 증가
- 클라이언트 사이드 우선 방식 제거 \(st_javascript 비동기 문제\)
- 주소/장소 검색 UI 제거

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh pr create --title "Fix GitHub data restoration on warm restart" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- Streamlit Cloud warm restart 시 GitHub에서 사용자 데이터 복원 안 되는 문제 수정
- users 테이블 존재 여부가 아닌 데이터 존재 여부로 복원 조건 변경

## Changes
- `app.py`: 사용자 수가 1명 이하면 GitHub에서 복원 시도
- `auth/session_init.py`: 디버그 로그 추가

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)" --base master)

Bash(git -C "C:\\Users\\dA\\inni-platform" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix Word doc table export, PDF direct analysis null safety, download button type error

- Add structured output table field \(headers/rows\) to Word document generation
- Fix NoneType iteration error in PDF direct analysis streaming/non-streaming paths
- Fix download button invalid binary data format for non-string results
- Update dspy_analyzer and other module changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:\\Users\\dA\\inni-platform" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Migrate from SQLite + GitHub to Supabase PostgreSQL

- Replace SQLite db_manager with SQL-to-Supabase REST API translator
- Add supabase_client.py singleton module
- Add supabase_schema.sql for table creation
- Remove GitHub storage backup/restore from session_init, block_manager, app.py
- Add JSONB auto-parsing for session_data, progress_data, block_data columns
- Update requirements.txt with supabase package
- Update secrets.toml.example and .env.example with Supabase config

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:\\Users\\dA\\inni-platform" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix JOIN queries for Supabase compatibility

- Replace LEFT JOIN in admin_manager with Supabase foreign key select
- Replace LEFT JOIN in block_manager with Supabase foreign key select

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(SUPABASE_URL=https://fkqdkwplddvowghdgssl.supabase.co SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImZrcWRrd3BsZGR2b3dnaGRnc3NsIiwicm9sZSI6InNlcnZpY2Vfcm9sZSIsImlhdCI6MTc3MTQ2NDYwOCwiZXhwIjoyMDg3MDQwNjA4fQ.t4-HWuYKZ00h6OBbDVXdTFyvIqK-0urbW00up_KYb8s /c/Users/dA/miniconda3/envs/da_AI_env/python.exe - <<'PYEOF'
import os
from supabase import create_client

url = os.environ["SUPABASE_URL"]
key = os.environ["SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY"]
client = create_client\(url, key\)

# 1. projects 테이블 - 삼척 스포츠아카데미-1
print\("=== projects ==="\)
r = client.table\("projects"\).select\("*"\).ilike\("name", "%삼척%"\).execute\(\)
for row in r.data:
    print\(f"  id={row['id']} | name={row['name']} | status={row['status']} | location={row.get\('location',''\)[:40]} | updated_at={str\(row.get\('updated_at',''\)\)[:19]}"\)

if not r.data:
    print\("  \(없음\)"\)
    import sys; sys.exit\(\)

project_id = r.data[0]['id']
user_id = r.data[0].get\('user_id'\)
print\(f"\\n  → project_id={project_id}, user_id={user_id}"\)

# 2. analysis_sessions
print\("\\n=== analysis_sessions \(최근 3개\) ==="\)
r2 = client.table\("analysis_sessions"\).select\("id, user_id, project_id, created_at, session_data"\).eq\("project_id", project_id\).order\("created_at", desc=True\).limit\(3\).execute\(\)
for row in r2.data:
    sd = row.get\("session_data"\) or {}
    pn = sd.get\("project_name",""\)
    pg = sd.get\("project_goals",""\)[:30] if sd.get\("project_goals"\) else ""
    ai = sd.get\("additional_info",""\)[:20] if sd.get\("additional_info"\) else ""
    keys = [k for k in sd.keys\(\) if not k.startswith\("_"\)]
    print\(f"  id={row['id']} | {str\(row['created_at']\)[:19]}"\)
    print\(f"    project_name={pn!r} | goals={pg!r} | info={ai!r}"\)
    print\(f"    저장 키: {len\(keys\)}개"\)

# 3. analysis_runs
print\("\\n=== analysis_runs ==="\)
r3 = client.table\("analysis_runs"\).select\("*"\).eq\("project_id", project_id\).order\("created_at", desc=True\).limit\(3\).execute\(\)
for row in r3.data:
    print\(f"  run_id={row['id']} | status={row['status']} | finished_at={str\(row.get\('finished_at',''\)\)[:19]}"\)

# 4. analysis_steps
print\("\\n=== analysis_steps ==="\)
if r3.data:
    run_id = r3.data[0]['id']
    r4 = client.table\("analysis_steps"\).select\("id, step_id, status, started_at, finished_at"\).eq\("run_id", run_id\).execute\(\)
    for row in r4.data:
        print\(f"  step_id={row['step_id']} | status={row['status']} | started={str\(row.get\('started_at',''\)\)[:19]} | finished={str\(row.get\('finished_at',''\)\)[:19]}"\)
    if not r4.data:
        print\("  \(없음\)"\)

# 5. analysis_progress
print\("\\n=== analysis_progress ==="\)
r5 = client.table\("analysis_progress"\).select\("id, user_id, project_id, updated_at, progress_data"\).eq\("project_id", project_id\).execute\(\)
for row in r5.data:
    pd = row.get\("progress_data"\) or {}
    flags = []
    if pd.get\("cot_results"\): flags.append\(f"cot_results\({len\(pd['cot_results']\)}블록\)"\)
    if pd.get\("cot_session"\): flags.append\("cot_session"\)
    if pd.get\("selected_blocks"\): flags.append\(f"selected_blocks\({len\(pd['selected_blocks']\)}개\)"\)
    print\(f"  id={row['id']} | project_id={row['project_id']} | updated={str\(row.get\('updated_at',''\)\)[:19]}"\)
    print\(f"    내용: {', '.join\(flags\) or '없음'}"\)
if not r5.data:
    print\("  \(없음\)"\)

PYEOF)
